source.name: Chapter 1.2: 1.4 Test Your Knowledge - When to Use Actions
source.instructions: **When should you use an action instead of a simple response?**

answers.answer: When you need dynamic content (e.g. current day), calculations, or external data (e.g. database, API)
Whenever you want to send any message to the user
When the message never changes and is static text
Only when the flow has more than three steps

source.learningObjectives: SWBAT decide when to use actions vs responses
source.guidance: Use actions when you need dynamic responses (e.g. 'We're open today until 5pm' based on current day), calculations, data processing, external integrations, or conditional logic. Use simple responses (utter_*) for static text that never changes and does not require any processing.
